text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O, who joined the academy at the same
time as me, chases after her role model Maruzen,
hoping to one day race her!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Since we both have someone we want to
challenge one day, we make a promise to work
hard and support each other's dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You know, Yaeno and Chiyono O's eyes both
shine so bright when they talk about their dreams!
Now I wanna make my own dreams come true
even more!
